title: taraxacum platycarpum subsp. maruyamanum
intro: Taraxacum platycarpum subsp. maruyamanum is a lesser-known subspecies of the dandelion plant, a type of flowering herb that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum platycarpum subsp. maruyamanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support liver function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. This plant can be prepared in various ways, including as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
